description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, package, and deploy. In the build stage add a build:backend job using the golang:latest image that runs a before_script to wget the swagger and dep binaries, verify their SHA256 checksums, chmod +x them, copy the repository into /go/src/git.callpipe.com/finn/piston-go and cd there; then its script runs swagger generate server -P piston.BrowserSubscription -f ./api-spec.yml, dep ensure, CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -v ./cmd/piston-server, and moves the resulting piston-server binary to ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/piston-server, publishing it as an artifact. Also in the build stage add a build:frontend job using the node:latest image that runs npm install and npx webpack, publishing the static/dist directory as an artifact. In the package stage add a package:docker job that depends on both build jobs, uses the docker image, runs ls, builds a Docker image with tag ${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:${CI_COMMIT_SHA:0:8}, tags it also as ${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}, and pushes both tags to the registry. Finally, in the deploy stage add a deploy job that runs only on the master branch, uses the custom deployer image registry.git.callpipe.com/k8s.janky.solutions/deployer:27a49a80, sets the production environment with URL https://piston, and executes deploy piston piston registry.git.callpipe.com/finn/piston-go:${CI_COMMIT_SHA:0:8} piston.
